prompt: I need to hand this model off to a colleague who has never seen it. Can you produce a complete Logic Map so they can understand every business rule without opening the spreadsheet?
assertions: Lists ALL 24 Named Ranges with their business rules in plain English
Shows the dependency chain from inputs through calculations to outputs
Each formula description is understandable without Excel knowledge
Includes the key input levers and their downstream effects
Does NOT include cell coordinate references in the Logic Map
